'''thashofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:huanghoite|huanghoite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:huanghoite|huanghoite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thashofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæshefeth|thæshefeth]] || [[word:thæshefej|thæshefej]] || [[word:thæshefesh|thæshefesh]] || [[word:thæshefe|thæshefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thashoshofoth|thashoshofoth]] || [[word:thashoshofoj|thashoshofoj]] || [[word:thashoshofosh|thashoshofosh]] || [[word:thashoshofo|thashoshofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashofoth|thashofoth]] || [[word:thashofoj|thashofoj]] || [[word:thashofosh|thashofosh]] || [[word:thashofo|thashofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashoffoth|thashoffoth]] || [[word:thashoffoj|thashoffoj]] || [[word:thashoffosh|thashoffosh]] || [[word:thashoffof|thashoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thashofotho|thashofotho]] || [[word:thashofojo|thashofojo]] || [[word:thashofosho|thashofosho]] || [[word:thashofoko|thashofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thashofoth|thashofoth]] || [[word:thashofoj|thashofoj]] || [[word:thashofosh|thashofosh]] || [[word:thashofo|thashofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thashofothol|thashofothol]] || [[word:thashofojol|thashofojol]] || [[word:thashofoshol|thashofoshol]] || [[word:thashofokol|thashofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thashofothotho|thashofothotho]] || [[word:thashofojojo|thashofojojo]] || [[word:thashofoshosho|thashofoshosho]] || [[word:thashofoko|thashofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thashofothon|thashofothon]] || [[word:thashofojon|thashofojon]] || [[word:thashofoshon|thashofoshon]] || [[word:thashofokon|thashofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thashofothoro|thashofothoro]] || [[word:thashofojoro|thashofojoro]] || [[word:thashofoshoro|thashofoshoro]] || [[word:thashofokoro|thashofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
